headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Recasts Its Credit Facility, Is The Stock Still Undervalued?
summary: Nasdaq (NDAQ) has entered a new Amended and Restated Credit Agreement that establishes a US$1.5 billion senior unsecured five-year revolving credit facility, replacing its prior arrangement and updating key financing terms. See our latest analysis for Nasdaq. Nasdaq shares have picked up near term momentum, with a 4.04% 7 day share price return and 5.92% 90 day share price return. This is occurring even though the year to date share price return is down 8.88% and the 3 year total shareholder...
